mapper.select: select count(*) from post where category_idx = #{category_idx}
mapper.insert: insert into post( member_idx, category_idx, post_title, post_content, post_created_at, post_updated_at) values ( #{member_idx}, #{category_idx}, #{post_title}, #{post_content}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select count(*) from file where post_idx = #{post_idx}
mapper.update:
UPDATE file SET file_name_original = #{file_name_original}, file_name_stored = #{file_name_stored}, file_size = #{file_size}, file_type = #{file_type}, uploaded_at = NOW()
WHERE post_idx = #{post_idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file(post_idx, file_name_original, file_name_stored, file_s3_url, file_size, file_type, uploaded_at) VALUES ( #{post_idx}, #{file_name_original}, #{file_name_stored}, #{file_s3_url}, #{file_size}, #{file_type}, NOW() )
mapper.select:
select count(*) from post p LEFT JOIN member m ON p.member_idx = m.member_idx
p.post_title LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
p.post_content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
m.member_nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
AND p.category_idx = 2
SELECT DATE(post_created_at) AS post_day, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM post WHERE category_idx = 2 AND post_created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(post_created_at) ORDER BY post_day;

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY r.report_idx DESC) AS rnum, r.*, c.comment_content, p.post_title, reporter.member_nickname AS reporter_nickname, reported.member_nickname AS reported_nickname FROM report r JOIN comment c ON r.comment_idx = c.comment_idx JOIN post p ON c.post_idx = p.post_idx JOIN member reporter ON r.reporter_idx = reporter.member_idx JOIN member reported ON r.reported_idx = reported.member_idx WHERE r.target_type = #{target_type} ) sub WHERE sub.rnum BETWEEN #{begin} AND #{end] ORDER BY sub.report_idx DESC;
